reliabilityChanges: Native recorder startup cancellation spans listener registration and the platform start promise.
A listener resolving after cancellation is detached and cannot authorize capture or leak events into a later meeting.
A platform recorder start resolving active after cancellation triggers another bounded stop before the stale result is rejected.
Native speech cleanup is bounded before Retry and after failure; uncertainty preserves audio/checkpoints and visibly requires reopen before another recognizer can start.
Native recorder flush/listener cleanup, import progress-listener attach/remove, and native/browser free-space probes have terminal deadlines.
A late native import listener is detached asynchronously rather than leaking into another import.

focusedCoverage: native platform start resolves after cancellation and is stopped again
native listener resolves after cancellation and is detached before capture
recording startup recovery with verified, empty, and uncertain storage evidence
saved transcription checkpoint and export completeness invariants

ios.knownHostGate: Xcode 26.3 cannot mount the developer disk image for the paired iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build and race-injection evidence does not prove late-start/cancel behavior under physical mobile suspension, locked 60/120-minute recording, real saved-audio transcription, interruption recovery, or destination-app receipt.
